problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: Combining Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
